name: 头部关注
author: r-markdown
content:
<!-- 素材开始 -->
<container height="50px" padding="0px" margin="20px 0" bg="#27ae60" border-style="none" radius="50px" direction="row" align="start-center">
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 48 48" width="48" height="48" style="margin-left:20px">
  <g fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="4.5"
     stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
    <path d="M24 36 L24 16 M24 16 L14 26 M24 16 L34 26" opacity="0.4">
      <animateTransform attributeName="transform" type="translate"
        values="0,8; 0,8; 0,-8; 0,-8; 0,8"
        dur="1.2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      <animate attributeName="opacity"
        values="0.4; 1; 1; 0.4; 0.4"
        dur="1.2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
    </path>
  </g>
</svg>
<container width="" height="40px" padding="0px" margin="0px 5px 0 20px" bg="#ffffff" border-style="none" radius="50px" direction="row" align="center-center" extra-style="flex-grow:1">
<text>点击上方</text>
<text color="#028af2" weight="600">「蓝字」</text>
<text>关注我们</text>
</conatiner>
</container>
<!-- 素材结束 -->
